entities.name: ALGAL FLOWAY
entities.description: A cultivation system used to treat urban wastewater and produce algal biomass for biodiesel production

entities.name: URBAN WASTEWATER
entities.description: The nutrient-rich water from urban areas used as a growth medium for algae

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of algal growth measured in dry weight per unit area per day

entities.name: LIPID CONTENTS
entities.description: The amount of lipids present in the algal biomass, expressed as a percentage of dry cell weight

entities.name: BIODIESEL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of converting algal lipids into biofuel

entities.name: NUTRIENT REMOVAL RATE
entities.description: The efficiency of the system in removing nitrogen and phosphorus from the wastewater

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A key nutrient removed from urban wastewater during the algal cultivation process

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A key nutrient removed from urban wastewater during the algal cultivation process

entities.name: CETANE NUMBER
entities.description: A quality parameter of biodiesel indicating its ignition quality

entities.name: COLD FILTER PLUGGING POINT
entities.description: A quality parameter of biodiesel indicating its cold-flow properties

entities.name: EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID
entities.description: An omega-3 fatty acid produced by algae, specifically noted during winter growth cycles

entities.name: PENNATE DIATOMS
entities.description: The dominant group of algae found within the algal floway community across all seasons

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the urban wastewater study was conducted

entities.name: ALGAE BIOFUEL FEEDSTOCK
entities.description: The biomass produced from algae that serves as the raw material for biofuel
